TrustRelationships.Notes: Cross-account root trust without ExternalId condition. Any user in account 9876543210 can assume this role with full admin privileges.
Recommendations: Add ExternalId condition to trust policy
Replace AdministratorAccess with read-only audit policy

TrustRelationships.Notes: Service-linked trust is correct, but AdministratorAccess is excessive for Lambda execution.
Recommendations: Replace AdministratorAccess with a custom least-privilege policy
Scope permissions to specific ECS/VPC resources the Lambda needs

TrustRelationships.Notes: Properly scoped read-only role — no issues found
